== Notes for [[Item:Q115593|Q115593]] ==

=Elvira Sorred=

* Daughter of Sorred Fernández de Saavedra, Señor de Sotomayor and Teresa hija de Fávila

=Married=

* Married:: Nuno Nunez Sanchez De Deza Y Aldana

=Children=

* '''Gudesteo Núñez,'''
* '''Conde de Monterroso Arias Núñez, senhor da Casa do Sirgal;'''

=Sources=

* La Sorprendente Genealogía De Mis Tatarabuelos, By Ramón Rionda - https://books.google.com/books?id=eQxDCQAAQBAJ&pg=PT44&lpg=PT44&dq=Sorred+Fern%C3%A1ndez+de+Saavedra,+Se%C3%B1or+de+Sotomayor&source=bl&ots=iIU-YYWgcN&sig=ACfU3U1ZjRV41R7qIdUJcLkVcgyEpoOW6g&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjHlN6twoTzAhUQCTQIHRnwCZcQ6AF6BAgSEAI#v=onepage&q=Sorred%20Fern%C3%A1ndez%20de%20Saavedra%2C%20Se%C3%B1or%20de%20Sotomayor&f=false

* Los Reyes nuevos de Toledo: descrivense las cosas mas augustas y notables de, By Cristóbal Lozano - https://books.google.com/books?id=5RZfUlSxUxEC&pg=PA430&lpg=PA430&dq=Infanta+Teresa+hija+de+F%C3%A1vila&source=bl&ots=mf15q6YlNU&sig=ACfU3U1XSp9rwc7PQTVu7LiN999FNQ6WrQ&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiY6ui0voTzAhXoJzQIHSoNBQQQ6AF6BAgcEAI#v=onepage&q=Infanta%20Teresa%20hija%20de%20F%C3%A1vila&f=false

* Nobiliario de los reinos y señorios de España, Volume , By Francisco Piferrer - https://books.google.com/books?id=lDUVkvhVdW4C&pg=PA117&lpg=PA117&dq=Teresa+hija+de+F%C3%A1vila&source=bl&ots=Ck6i6vnxta&sig=ACfU3U24m8jHXNeiRR8zmJmhw9Y-WmQWZA&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiXm7KPuoTzAhU8JzQIHVv8AB0Q6AF6BAgYEAI#v=onepage&q=Teresa%20hija%20de%20F%C3%A1vila&f=false

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
